SAKURA_MOD_EVENT_CLASSIC_XIAO_LANGS_FEEL: Xiao Lang stands beside the road, stiff with embarrassment and resolve. He offers a small charm that carries a quiet warmth.
The charm settles into your deck as The Love.
You leave the charm behind, but the conversation steadies you.
SAKURA_MOD_EVENT_CLASSIC_THE_SEALED_CARD: A blank space opens in the air. It is not silence, not darkness, but the absence beneath both. The Nothing is waiting.
Fight The Nothing. Rewards: gold and The Nothing.
Locked: The Love changes this battle.
The Love is in your deck.
Face The Nothing with The Love.
Fight The Nothing. The Love will be removed. Rewards: gold and The Hope.
You do not have The Love.
Lose 20% of your Max HP. Remove 2 random cards from your deck.
You tear yourself away from the absence. It takes part of you and two memories with it.
The empty pressure breaks. What remains is a card, and the shape of what answered it.
